children.heading: Corporation
children.label: 1 Corporation
children.text: The term “Corporation” means the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.

children.heading: Savings association
children.label: 2 Savings association
children.text: The term “savings association” means a savings association, as defined in section 3 of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act [], the deposits of which are insured by the Corporation.12 U.S.C. 1813

children.heading: Federal savings association
children.label: 3 Federal savings association
children.text: The term “Federal savings association” means a Federal savings association or a Federal savings bank chartered under .section 1464 of this title

children.heading: National bank
children.label: 4 National bank
children.text: The term “national bank” has the same meaning as in section 3 of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act [].12 U.S.C. 1813

children.heading: Federal banking agencies
children.label: 5 Federal banking agencies
children.text: The term “Federal banking agencies” means the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.

children.heading: State
children.label: 6 State
children.text: The term “State” has the same meaning as in section 3 of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act [].12 U.S.C. 1813

children.heading: Affiliate
children.label: 7 Affiliate
children.text: The term “affiliate” means any person that controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with, a savings association, except as provided in .section 1467a of this title

children.heading: Board
children.label: 8 Board
children.text: The term “Board”, other than in the context of the Board of Directors of the Corporation, means the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.

children.heading: Comptroller
children.label: 9 Comptroller
children.text: The term “Comptroller” means the Comptroller of the Currency.

children.heading: Appropriate Federal banking agency
children.label: 10 Appropriate Federal banking agency
children.text: The term “appropriate Federal banking agency” has the same meaning as in section 3(q) of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act ().12 U.S.C. 1813(q)

children.heading: Functionally regulated subsidiary
children.label: 11 Functionally regulated subsidiary
children.text: The term “functionally regulated subsidiary” has the same meaning as in section 5(c)(5) of the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956 ().12 U.S.C. 1844(c)(5)
